ogTitle: Kaltjiti vs Kangaroo Flat: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kaltjiti and Kangaroo Flat.
heading: Kaltjiti vs Kangaroo Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kaltjiti, South Australia and Kangaroo Flat, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kaltjiti has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Kangaroo Flat (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kaltjiti or Kangaroo Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kaltjiti has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Kangaroo Flat scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kaltjiti scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Kangaroo Flat scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kaltjiti or Kangaroo Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kaltjiti has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.77% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
